sudo -u ec2-user bash -c 'cat > /tmp/peek.py <<PYEOF
import json, glob, os
os.chdir("/home/ec2-user/platform/data/smoker-shard-a")
for p in sorted(glob.glob("*/cases/*.json")):
    d = json.load(open(p))
    t = d["trace"]
    if not t["steps"]:
        continue
    if "No accessibility tree available" in t["steps"][0]["observation"]:
        print("===", d["caseId"], "===")
        print("  outcome:", t["outcome"], "steps:", t["totalSteps"])
        bl = (t.get("bridgeLog") or "")
        # Print last 1500 chars of bridge log
        print("  bridge log tail:")
        print("  " + bl[-1500:].replace("\n", "\n  "))
        print()
PYEOF
python3.11 /tmp/peek.py'
